mapper.sql: FROM ${schema}.bbs_pst tbbp INNER JOIN ${schema}.bbs tbb ON tbb.bbs_oid = tbbp.bbs_oid WHERE tbb.bbs_se_cd = 'QNA' AND tbbp.up_bbs_pst_oid IS NULL AND tbbp.del_yn = 'N' AND tbb.stats_yn = 'Y'

FROM ${schema}.bbs_pst tbbp INNER JOIN ${schema}.bbs tbb ON tbb.bbs_oid = tbbp.bbs_oid INNER JOIN ( SELECT reply.up_bbs_pst_oid, MIN(tbh.reg_dt) AS first_reply_dt FROM ${schema}.bbs_hstry tbh INNER JOIN ${schema}.bbs_pst reply ON tbh.tbl_oid = reply.bbs_pst_oid WHERE tbh.tbl_nm = 'bbs_pst' AND tbh.stts = 'TEMP' AND reply.up_bbs_pst_oid IS NOT NULL AND reply.del_yn = 'N' GROUP BY reply.up_bbs_pst_oid ) ans ON tbbp.bbs_pst_oid = ans.up_bbs_pst_oid WHERE tbb.bbs_se_cd = 'QNA' AND tbbp.up_bbs_pst_oid IS NULL AND tbbp.del_yn = 'N' AND tbb.stats_yn = 'Y'

FROM ${schema}.bbs_pst tbbp INNER JOIN ${schema}.bbs tbb ON tbb.bbs_oid = tbbp.bbs_oid INNER JOIN ( SELECT reply.up_bbs_pst_oid, MIN(tbh.reg_dt) AS final_comp_dt FROM ${schema}.bbs_hstry tbh INNER JOIN ${schema}.bbs_pst reply ON tbh.tbl_oid = reply.bbs_pst_oid WHERE tbh.tbl_nm = 'bbs_pst' AND tbh.stts = 'COMP' AND reply.up_bbs_pst_oid IS NOT NULL AND reply.del_yn = 'N' GROUP BY reply.up_bbs_pst_oid ) hist ON tbbp.bbs_pst_oid = hist.up_bbs_pst_oid WHERE tbb.bbs_se_cd = 'QNA' AND tbbp.up_bbs_pst_oid IS NULL AND tbbp.del_yn = 'N' AND tbb.stats_yn = 'Y'
mapper.select:
-- selectMonthlyQnaStatisticsData -- Yearly SELECT 'YEARLY' AS periodType, CONCAT( YEAR(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d')), '년 누적', '(~', DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d'), '%m'), '월)' ) AS monthGrp, IFNULL(( SELECT COUNT(tbbp.bbs_pst_oid)
AND YEAR(tbbp.reg_dt) = YEAR(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d')) AND tbbp.reg_dt <= LAST_DAY(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d')) ), 0) AS questionCount, IFNULL(( SELECT COUNT(tbbp.bbs_pst_oid)
AND YEAR(ans.first_reply_dt) = YEAR(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d')) AND ans.first_reply_dt <= LAST_DAY(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d')) ), 0) AS draftCount, IFNULL(( SELECT COUNT(tbbp.bbs_pst_oid)
AND YEAR(hist.final_comp_dt) = YEAR(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d')) AND hist.final_comp_dt <= LAST_DAY(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d')) ), 0) AS finalCount, IFNULL(( SELECT ROUND(AVG(GREATEST(0, (DATEDIFF(ans.first_reply_dt, tbbp.reg_dt) - IFNULL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ${schema}.ntn_std_cldr d WHERE d.dt >= DATE(tbbp.reg_dt) AND d.dt <= DATE(ans.first_reply_dt) AND d.wrkdy_yn = 'N'), 0)))), 2)
AND YEAR(ans.first_reply_dt) = YEAR(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d')) AND ans.first_reply_dt <= LAST_DAY(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d')) ), 0) AS draftAverageDate, IFNULL(( SELECT ROUND(AVG(GREATEST(0, (DATEDIFF(hist.final_comp_dt, tbbp.reg_dt) - IFNULL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ${schema}.ntn_std_cldr d WHERE d.dt >= DATE(tbbp.reg_dt) AND d.dt <= DATE(hist.final_comp_dt) AND d.wrkdy_yn = 'N'), 0)))), 2)
AND YEAR(hist.final_comp_dt) = YEAR(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d')) AND hist.final_comp_dt <= LAST_DAY(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d')) ), 0) AS finalAverageDate
UNION ALL
-- Current Month SELECT 'CURRENT' AS periodType, #{toDate} AS monthGrp, IFNULL(( SELECT COUNT(tbbp.bbs_pst_oid)
AND DATE_FORMAT(tbbp.reg_dt, '%Y-%m') = #{toDate} ), 0) AS questionCount, IFNULL(( SELECT COUNT(tbbp.bbs_pst_oid)
AND DATE_FORMAT(ans.first_reply_dt, '%Y-%m') = #{toDate} ), 0) AS draftCount, IFNULL(( SELECT COUNT(tbbp.bbs_pst_oid)
AND DATE_FORMAT(hist.final_comp_dt, '%Y-%m') = #{toDate} ), 0) AS finalCount, IFNULL(( SELECT ROUND(AVG(GREATEST(0, (DATEDIFF(ans.first_reply_dt, tbbp.reg_dt) - IFNULL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ${schema}.ntn_std_cldr d WHERE d.dt >= DATE(tbbp.reg_dt) AND d.dt <= DATE(ans.first_reply_dt) AND d.wrkdy_yn = 'N'), 0)))), 2)
AND DATE_FORMAT(ans.first_reply_dt, '%Y-%m') = #{toDate} ), 0) AS draftAverageDate, IFNULL(( SELECT ROUND(AVG(GREATEST(0, (DATEDIFF(hist.final_comp_dt, tbbp.reg_dt) - IFNULL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ${schema}.ntn_std_cldr d WHERE d.dt >= DATE(tbbp.reg_dt) AND d.dt <= DATE(hist.final_comp_dt) AND d.wrkdy_yn = 'N'), 0)))), 2)
AND DATE_FORMAT(hist.final_comp_dt, '%Y-%m') = #{toDate} ), 0) AS finalAverageDate
UNION ALL
-- Previous Month SELECT 'PREVIOUS' AS periodType, DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') - INTERVAL 1 MONTH, '%Y-%m') AS monthGrp, IFNULL(( SELECT COUNT(tbbp.bbs_pst_oid)
AND DATE_FORMAT(tbbp.reg_dt, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') - INTERVAL 1 MONTH, '%Y-%m') ), 0) AS questionCount, IFNULL(( SELECT COUNT(tbbp.bbs_pst_oid)
AND DATE_FORMAT(ans.first_reply_dt, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') - INTERVAL 1 MONTH, '%Y-%m') ), 0) AS draftCount, IFNULL(( SELECT COUNT(tbbp.bbs_pst_oid)
AND DATE_FORMAT(hist.final_comp_dt, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') - INTERVAL 1 MONTH, '%Y-%m') ), 0) AS finalCount, IFNULL(( SELECT ROUND(AVG(GREATEST(0, (DATEDIFF(ans.first_reply_dt, tbbp.reg_dt) - IFNULL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ${schema}.ntn_std_cldr d WHERE d.dt >= DATE(tbbp.reg_dt) AND d.dt <= DATE(ans.first_reply_dt) AND d.wrkdy_yn = 'N'), 0)))), 2)
AND DATE_FORMAT(ans.first_reply_dt, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') - INTERVAL 1 MONTH, '%Y-%m') ), 0) AS draftAverageDate, IFNULL(( SELECT ROUND(AVG(GREATEST(0, (DATEDIFF(hist.final_comp_dt, tbbp.reg_dt) - IFNULL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ${schema}.ntn_std_cldr d WHERE d.dt >= DATE(tbbp.reg_dt) AND d.dt <= DATE(hist.final_comp_dt) AND d.wrkdy_yn = 'N'), 0)))), 2)
AND DATE_FORMAT(hist.final_comp_dt, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') - INTERVAL 1 MONTH, '%Y-%m') ), 0) AS finalAverageDate
UNION ALL
-- Same Month Last Year SELECT 'LAST_YEAR' AS periodType, DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') - INTERVAL 1 YEAR, '%Y-%m') AS monthGrp, IFNULL(( SELECT COUNT(tbbp.bbs_pst_oid)
AND DATE_FORMAT(tbbp.reg_dt, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') - INTERVAL 1 YEAR, '%Y-%m') ), 0) AS questionCount, IFNULL(( SELECT COUNT(tbbp.bbs_pst_oid)
AND DATE_FORMAT(ans.first_reply_dt, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') - INTERVAL 1 YEAR, '%Y-%m') ), 0) AS draftCount, IFNULL(( SELECT COUNT(tbbp.bbs_pst_oid)
AND DATE_FORMAT(hist.final_comp_dt, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') - INTERVAL 1 YEAR, '%Y-%m') ), 0) AS finalCount, IFNULL(( SELECT ROUND(AVG(GREATEST(0, (DATEDIFF(ans.first_reply_dt, tbbp.reg_dt) - IFNULL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ${schema}.ntn_std_cldr d WHERE d.dt >= DATE(tbbp.reg_dt) AND d.dt <= DATE(ans.first_reply_dt) AND d.wrkdy_yn = 'N'), 0)))), 2)
AND DATE_FORMAT(ans.first_reply_dt, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') - INTERVAL 1 YEAR, '%Y-%m') ), 0) AS draftAverageDate, IFNULL(( SELECT ROUND(AVG(GREATEST(0, (DATEDIFF(hist.final_comp_dt, tbbp.reg_dt) - IFNULL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ${schema}.ntn_std_cldr d WHERE d.dt >= DATE(tbbp.reg_dt) AND d.dt <= DATE(hist.final_comp_dt) AND d.wrkdy_yn = 'N'), 0)))), 2)
AND DATE_FORMAT(hist.final_comp_dt, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') - INTERVAL 1 YEAR, '%Y-%m') ), 0) AS finalAverageDate

-- selectMonthlyVisitorStatisticsData -- Yearly SELECT 'YEARLY' AS periodType, CONCAT( YEAR(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d')), '년 누적', '(~', DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d'), '%m'), '월)' ) AS monthGrp, IFNULL(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN user_oid IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('U_', user_oid) ELSE CONCAT('T_', ssn_id) END), 0) AS visitor, IFNULL(ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN user_oid IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('U_', user_oid) ELSE CONCAT('T_', ssn_id) END) / DAYOFYEAR(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d')), 2), 0) AS dailyVisitorAverage FROM ${schema}.user_acs_log WHERE acs_type = 'PAGE' AND YEAR(reg_dt) = YEAR(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d')) AND reg_dt <= LAST_DAY(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d'))
UNION ALL
-- Current Month SELECT 'CURRENT' AS periodType, #{toDate} AS monthGrp, IFNULL(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN user_oid IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('U_', user_oid) ELSE CONCAT('T_', ssn_id) END), 0) AS visitor, IFNULL(ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN user_oid IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('U_', user_oid) ELSE CONCAT('T_', ssn_id) END) / DAY(LAST_DAY(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d'))), 2), 0) AS dailyVisitorAverage FROM ${schema}.user_acs_log WHERE acs_type = 'PAGE' AND DATE_FORMAT(reg_dt, '%Y-%m') = #{toDate}
UNION ALL
-- Previous Month SELECT 'PREVIOUS' AS periodType, DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') - INTERVAL 1 MONTH, '%Y-%m') AS monthGrp, IFNULL(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN user_oid IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('U_', user_oid) ELSE CONCAT('T_', ssn_id) END), 0) AS visitor, IFNULL(ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN user_oid IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('U_', user_oid) ELSE CONCAT('T_', ssn_id) END) / DAY(LAST_DAY(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') - INTERVAL 1 MONTH)), 2), 0) AS dailyVisitorAverage FROM ${schema}.user_acs_log WHERE acs_type = 'PAGE' AND DATE_FORMAT(reg_dt, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') - INTERVAL 1 MONTH, '%Y-%m')
UNION ALL
-- Same Month Last Year SELECT 'LAST_YEAR' AS periodType, DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') - INTERVAL 1 YEAR, '%Y-%m') AS monthGrp, IFNULL(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN user_oid IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('U_', user_oid) ELSE CONCAT('T_', ssn_id) END), 0) AS visitor, IFNULL(ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN user_oid IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('U_', user_oid) ELSE CONCAT('T_', ssn_id) END) / DAY(LAST_DAY(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') - INTERVAL 1 YEAR)), 2), 0) AS dailyVisitorAverage FROM ${schema}.user_acs_log WHERE acs_type = 'PAGE' AND DATE_FORMAT(reg_dt, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') - INTERVAL 1 YEAR, '%Y-%m')

-- selectMonthlyQnaStatisticsDataForExcel -- Yearly SELECT 'YEARLY' AS periodType, CONCAT( YEAR(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d')), '년 누적', '(~', DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d'), '%m'), '월)' ) AS monthGrp, IFNULL(( SELECT COUNT(tbbp.bbs_pst_oid)
AND YEAR(tbbp.reg_dt) = YEAR(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d')) AND tbbp.reg_dt <= LAST_DAY(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d')) ), 0) AS questionCount, IFNULL(( SELECT COUNT(tbbp.bbs_pst_oid)
AND YEAR(ans.first_reply_dt) = YEAR(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d')) AND ans.first_reply_dt <= LAST_DAY(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d')) ), 0) AS draftCount, IFNULL(( SELECT COUNT(tbbp.bbs_pst_oid)
AND YEAR(hist.final_comp_dt) = YEAR(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d')) AND hist.final_comp_dt <= LAST_DAY(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d')) ), 0) AS finalCount, IFNULL(( SELECT ROUND(AVG(GREATEST(0, (DATEDIFF(ans.first_reply_dt, tbbp.reg_dt) - IFNULL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ${schema}.ntn_std_cldr d WHERE d.dt >= DATE(tbbp.reg_dt) AND d.dt <= DATE(ans.first_reply_dt) AND d.wrkdy_yn = 'N'), 0)))), 2)
AND YEAR(ans.first_reply_dt) = YEAR(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d')) AND ans.first_reply_dt <= LAST_DAY(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d')) ), 0) AS draftAverageDate, IFNULL(( SELECT ROUND(AVG(GREATEST(0, (DATEDIFF(hist.final_comp_dt, tbbp.reg_dt) - IFNULL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ${schema}.ntn_std_cldr d WHERE d.dt >= DATE(tbbp.reg_dt) AND d.dt <= DATE(hist.final_comp_dt) AND d.wrkdy_yn = 'N'), 0)))), 2)
AND YEAR(hist.final_comp_dt) = YEAR(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d')) AND hist.final_comp_dt <= LAST_DAY(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d')) ), 0) AS finalAverageDate
UNION ALL
-- Current Month SELECT 'CURRENT' AS periodType, #{toDate} AS monthGrp, IFNULL(( SELECT COUNT(tbbp.bbs_pst_oid)
AND DATE_FORMAT(tbbp.reg_dt, '%Y-%m') = #{toDate} ), 0) AS questionCount, IFNULL(( SELECT COUNT(tbbp.bbs_pst_oid)
AND DATE_FORMAT(ans.first_reply_dt, '%Y-%m') = #{toDate} ), 0) AS draftCount, IFNULL(( SELECT COUNT(tbbp.bbs_pst_oid)
AND DATE_FORMAT(hist.final_comp_dt, '%Y-%m') = #{toDate} ), 0) AS finalCount, IFNULL(( SELECT ROUND(AVG(GREATEST(0, (DATEDIFF(ans.first_reply_dt, tbbp.reg_dt) - IFNULL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ${schema}.ntn_std_cldr d WHERE d.dt >= DATE(tbbp.reg_dt) AND d.dt <= DATE(ans.first_reply_dt) AND d.wrkdy_yn = 'N'), 0)))), 2)
AND DATE_FORMAT(ans.first_reply_dt, '%Y-%m') = #{toDate} ), 0) AS draftAverageDate, IFNULL(( SELECT ROUND(AVG(GREATEST(0, (DATEDIFF(hist.final_comp_dt, tbbp.reg_dt) - IFNULL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ${schema}.ntn_std_cldr d WHERE d.dt >= DATE(tbbp.reg_dt) AND d.dt <= DATE(hist.final_comp_dt) AND d.wrkdy_yn = 'N'), 0)))), 2)
AND DATE_FORMAT(hist.final_comp_dt, '%Y-%m') = #{toDate} ), 0) AS finalAverageDate
UNION ALL
-- Previous Month SELECT 'PREVIOUS' AS periodType, DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') - INTERVAL 1 MONTH, '%Y-%m') AS monthGrp, IFNULL(( SELECT COUNT(tbbp.bbs_pst_oid)
AND DATE_FORMAT(tbbp.reg_dt, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') - INTERVAL 1 MONTH, '%Y-%m') ), 0) AS questionCount, IFNULL(( SELECT COUNT(tbbp.bbs_pst_oid)
AND DATE_FORMAT(ans.first_reply_dt, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') - INTERVAL 1 MONTH, '%Y-%m') ), 0) AS draftCount, IFNULL(( SELECT COUNT(tbbp.bbs_pst_oid)
AND DATE_FORMAT(hist.final_comp_dt, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') - INTERVAL 1 MONTH, '%Y-%m') ), 0) AS finalCount, IFNULL(( SELECT ROUND(AVG(GREATEST(0, (DATEDIFF(ans.first_reply_dt, tbbp.reg_dt) - IFNULL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ${schema}.ntn_std_cldr d WHERE d.dt >= DATE(tbbp.reg_dt) AND d.dt <= DATE(ans.first_reply_dt) AND d.wrkdy_yn = 'N'), 0)))), 2)
AND DATE_FORMAT(ans.first_reply_dt, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') - INTERVAL 1 MONTH, '%Y-%m') ), 0) AS draftAverageDate, IFNULL(( SELECT ROUND(AVG(GREATEST(0, (DATEDIFF(hist.final_comp_dt, tbbp.reg_dt) - IFNULL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ${schema}.ntn_std_cldr d WHERE d.dt >= DATE(tbbp.reg_dt) AND d.dt <= DATE(hist.final_comp_dt) AND d.wrkdy_yn = 'N'), 0)))), 2)
AND DATE_FORMAT(hist.final_comp_dt, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') - INTERVAL 1 MONTH, '%Y-%m') ), 0) AS finalAverageDate
UNION ALL
-- Same Month Last Year SELECT 'LAST_YEAR' AS periodType, DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') - INTERVAL 1 YEAR, '%Y-%m') AS monthGrp, IFNULL(( SELECT COUNT(tbbp.bbs_pst_oid)
AND DATE_FORMAT(tbbp.reg_dt, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') - INTERVAL 1 YEAR, '%Y-%m') ), 0) AS questionCount, IFNULL(( SELECT COUNT(tbbp.bbs_pst_oid)
AND DATE_FORMAT(ans.first_reply_dt, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') - INTERVAL 1 YEAR, '%Y-%m') ), 0) AS draftCount, IFNULL(( SELECT COUNT(tbbp.bbs_pst_oid)
AND DATE_FORMAT(hist.final_comp_dt, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') - INTERVAL 1 YEAR, '%Y-%m') ), 0) AS finalCount, IFNULL(( SELECT ROUND(AVG(GREATEST(0, (DATEDIFF(ans.first_reply_dt, tbbp.reg_dt) - IFNULL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ${schema}.ntn_std_cldr d WHERE d.dt >= DATE(tbbp.reg_dt) AND d.dt <= DATE(ans.first_reply_dt) AND d.wrkdy_yn = 'N'), 0)))), 2)
AND DATE_FORMAT(ans.first_reply_dt, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') - INTERVAL 1 YEAR, '%Y-%m') ), 0) AS draftAverageDate, IFNULL(( SELECT ROUND(AVG(GREATEST(0, (DATEDIFF(hist.final_comp_dt, tbbp.reg_dt) - IFNULL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ${schema}.ntn_std_cldr d WHERE d.dt >= DATE(tbbp.reg_dt) AND d.dt <= DATE(hist.final_comp_dt) AND d.wrkdy_yn = 'N'), 0)))), 2)
AND DATE_FORMAT(hist.final_comp_dt, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') - INTERVAL 1 YEAR, '%Y-%m') ), 0) AS finalAverageDate

-- selectMonthlyVisitorStatisticsDataForExcel -- Yearly SELECT 'YEARLY' AS periodType, CONCAT( YEAR(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d')), '년 누적', '(~', DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d'), '%m'), '월)' ) AS monthGrp, IFNULL(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN user_oid IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('U_', user_oid) ELSE CONCAT('T_', ssn_id) END), 0) AS visitor, IFNULL(ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN user_oid IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('U_', user_oid) ELSE CONCAT('T_', ssn_id) END) / DAYOFYEAR(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d')), 2), 0) AS dailyVisitorAverage FROM ${schema}.user_acs_log WHERE acs_type = 'PAGE' AND YEAR(reg_dt) = YEAR(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d')) AND reg_dt <= LAST_DAY(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d'))
UNION ALL
-- Current Month SELECT 'CURRENT' AS periodType, #{toDate} AS monthGrp, IFNULL(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN user_oid IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('U_', user_oid) ELSE CONCAT('T_', ssn_id) END), 0) AS visitor, IFNULL(ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN user_oid IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('U_', user_oid) ELSE CONCAT('T_', ssn_id) END) / DAY(LAST_DAY(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d'))), 2), 0) AS dailyVisitorAverage FROM ${schema}.user_acs_log WHERE acs_type = 'PAGE' AND DATE_FORMAT(reg_dt, '%Y-%m') = #{toDate}
UNION ALL
-- Previous Month SELECT 'PREVIOUS' AS periodType, DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') - INTERVAL 1 MONTH, '%Y-%m') AS monthGrp, IFNULL(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN user_oid IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('U_', user_oid) ELSE CONCAT('T_', ssn_id) END), 0) AS visitor, IFNULL(ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN user_oid IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('U_', user_oid) ELSE CONCAT('T_', ssn_id) END) / DAY(LAST_DAY(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') - INTERVAL 1 MONTH)), 2), 0) AS dailyVisitorAverage FROM ${schema}.user_acs_log WHERE acs_type = 'PAGE' AND DATE_FORMAT(reg_dt, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') - INTERVAL 1 MONTH, '%Y-%m')
UNION ALL
-- Same Month Last Year SELECT 'LAST_YEAR' AS periodType, DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') - INTERVAL 1 YEAR, '%Y-%m') AS monthGrp, IFNULL(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN user_oid IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('U_', user_oid) ELSE CONCAT('T_', ssn_id) END), 0) AS visitor, IFNULL(ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN user_oid IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('U_', user_oid) ELSE CONCAT('T_', ssn_id) END) / DAY(LAST_DAY(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') - INTERVAL 1 YEAR)), 2), 0) AS dailyVisitorAverage FROM ${schema}.user_acs_log WHERE acs_type = 'PAGE' AND DATE_FORMAT(reg_dt, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{toDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') - INTERVAL 1 YEAR, '%Y-%m')
